user.label: Label
user.removeUserConfirmation: Are you sure you want to remove this user from the group?

toast.userAdded: The user has successfully been added to the group.
toast.userRemoved: The user has successfully been removed from the group.

ADD_USER_TO_GROUP.label: Add user to group
ADD_USER_TO_GROUP.description: User <%= user.firstName %> <%= user.lastName %> has been added to group <%= group.label %> with role <%= role %>

REMOVE_USER_FROM_GROUP.label: Revove user from group
REMOVE_USER_FROM_GROUP.description: User <%= user.firstName %> <%= user.lastName %> has been removed from group <%= group.label %>

IMPERSONATE_USER.label: User impersonation
IMPERSONATE_USER.description: The impersonation of user <%= user.firstName %> <%= user.lastName %> has started
